title: °Maia/factory/os/factories-registry
description: Schema registry CoMap - maps schema namekeys (e.g., °Maia/factory/data/todos) to schema co-ids (co_z...). Stored in account.os.factories

additionalProperties.description: Schema namekey → schema co-id mapping (e.g., °Maia/factory/data/todos → co_z123...)
